sections.content:
Now I can see the full picture clearly from the ascii output:
Row 31: ccccccGGGGGGGWGG - White 'W' at col 22 (relative to substring starting at col 8, so absolute col 30)
Row 32: ccccccGGGGGGwWWG - 'w' at col 21, 'W' at cols 22-23
Row 33: ccccccGGGGGGGwGG - 'w' at col 22
Row 35: ccccccOOOOOGGGGG - Orange block at cols 14-18 (absolute)
Row 36: ccccccOOOOOGGGGG - Orange block at cols 14-18
Row 37: ccccccbbbbbGGGGG - Blue block at cols 14-18
So the white cross is at cols ~21-23, rows 31-33. The blocks are at cols 14-18, rows 35-39. The blocks are BELOW and to the LEFT of the white cross.
Wait, but the substring starts at col 8. So:
- Orange block: cols 14-18 in the substring, which is absolute cols 8+6=14 to 8+10=18. So the blocks are at absolute cols 14-18.
- White cross: 'W' at position 22 in the substring (counting from 0), which is absolute col 8+22=30. Wait, that doesn't match the image.
Let me recount. The substring is `ascii_lines[i][8:24]`, which is characters at indices 8 through 23 (16 characters).
Row 31: ccccccGGGGGGGWGG
Position: 0123456789...
'W' is at position 14 in this substring, which is absolute col 8+14=22.
Row 35: ccccccOOOOOGGGGG
'O' starts at position 6, which is absolute col 8+6=14.
So the white cross is at absolute col 22, and the blocks are at absolute cols 14-18. The blocks are to the LEFT of the white cross.
Looking at the image, the blocks are on the LEFT side of the gray structure, and the white cross is also on the LEFT side but more to the RIGHT. The blocks need to move RIGHT to align with the white cross.
But wait, the blocks are at rows 35-39 (orange at 35-36, blue at 37-39), and the white cross is at rows 31-33. The blocks are BELOW the white cross. I need to move UP to align vertically.
So the plan is:
1. Move UP to align the blocks with the white cross vertically (rows 31-33)
2. Move RIGHT to align the blocks with the white cross horizontally (col 22)
The orange block is at rows 35-36. To align with the white cross at rows 31-33, I need to move UP by 2-4 rows.
The blocks are at cols 14-18. To align with the white cross at col 22, I need to move RIGHT by 4-8 columns.
Let me try moving UP first to align vertically, then RIGHT to align horizontally.
